name: Orange Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in lemon juice. Set aside.
2. Combine egg yolks, orange juice, and 1/2 cup sugar. Add a few drops yellow and red food coloring. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
3. Remove from heat and add the softened gelatin mixture. Stir until fully melted.
4. Cool the mixture to reach the consistency of beaten egg whites.
5. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar together until soft peaks form.
6. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold in the cooled gelatin mixture into the whipped egg white mixture.
8. Pour the batter into a prepared flaky pastry shell.
9. Chill the pie for at least 2 hours before serving.
10. Top with sweetened whipped cream and garnish with orange slices.
